destinations.evidence: The factory specializes the EVM to RitualPrecompiles and both normal and inspector creation paths install RitualPrecompiles::new().

equivalence_argument: Both EVM construction paths replace the default Ethereum precompile provider with RitualPrecompiles, so Ritual precompile dispatch is present regardless of inspector use.
notes: Mapped in nodebuilder custom EVM factory.
rationale: The EVM type becomes generic over precompile provider, the factory EVM associated type is specialized to RitualPrecompiles, and both creation paths call with_precompiles(RitualPrecompiles::new()). No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RitualEvmFactory-created EVM instances, both with and without inspectors, must use RitualPrecompiles as their precompile provider rather than the default Ethereum precompiles alone.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create EVMs through RitualEvmFactory with and without inspectors and assert Ritual precompile addresses are available/called while default-only EVMs would not handle them.
summary: RitualEvmFactory installs RitualPrecompiles for normal and inspector EVMs.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create normal and inspector EVMs through RitualEvmFactory and assert Ritual precompile addresses dispatch through RitualPrecompiles.
title: Ritual EVM installs Ritual precompiles
